items.title: Iran demands guarantees for World Cup participation
items.dek: The Iranian Football Federation (FFIRI) has presented Fifa with 10 conditions for participation at the World Cup in the US, Mexico and Canada.
items.body: The Iranian Football Federation (FFIRI) has presented Fifa with 10 conditions for participation at the World Cup in the US, Mexico and Canada.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Greece conducts controlled blast of mystery naval drone explosives
items.dek: The unmanned vessel, suspected to be of Ukrainian origin, was found by fishermen in a cave on Thursday.
items.body: The unmanned vessel, suspected to be of Ukrainian origin, was found by fishermen in a cave on Thursday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very different
items.dek: The BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.
items.body: The BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.
items.author: IriLine Desk
